metadata.description: Execution-based eval pairs for AskChokro benchmarking

pairs.question: Show me all users limit 1
pairs.expectedSql: SELECT * FROM users LIMIT 1

pairs.question: Who is Alice?
pairs.expectedSql: SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = 'Alice'

pairs.question: List all products under $15
pairs.expectedSql: SELECT * FROM products WHERE price < 15

pairs.question: Find pending orders
pairs.expectedSql: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE status = 'pending'

pairs.question: Total revenue
pairs.expectedSql: SELECT SUM(total_amount) FROM orders WHERE status = 'completed'

pairs.question: How many products do we have?
pairs.expectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM products

pairs.question: Average order value
pairs.expectedSql: SELECT AVG(total_amount) FROM orders

pairs.question: Total stock across all products
pairs.expectedSql: SELECT SUM(stock_quantity) FROM products

pairs.question: What did Alice order?
pairs.expectedSql: SELECT orders.* FROM orders JOIN users ON orders.user_id = users.id WHERE users.name = 'Alice'

pairs.question: List items in order 1
pairs.expectedSql: SELECT products.name, order_items.quantity FROM order_items JOIN products ON order_items.product_id = products.id WHERE order_items.order_id = 1

pairs.question: Who bought a Widget?
pairs.expectedSql: SELECT DISTINCT users.name FROM users JOIN orders ON users.id = orders.user_id JOIN order_items ON orders.id = order_items.order_id JOIN products ON order_items.product_id = products.id WHERE products.name = 'Widget'

pairs.question: Total revenue per user
pairs.expectedSql: SELECT users.name, SUM(orders.total_amount) FROM users JOIN orders ON users.id = orders.user_id GROUP BY users.name

pairs.question: Orders from today
pairs.expectedSql: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE date(created_at) = date('now')
pairs.postgresExpectedSql: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE date_trunc('day', created_at) = date_trunc('day', CURRENT_DATE)

pairs.question: Users who joined this month
pairs.expectedSql: SELECT * FROM users WHERE strftime('%Y-%m', created_at) = strftime('%Y-%m', 'now')
pairs.postgresExpectedSql: SELECT * FROM users WHERE date_trunc('month', created_at) = date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)

pairs.question: Orders placed in the last 7 days
pairs.expectedSql: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE created_at >= date('now', '-7 days')
pairs.postgresExpectedSql: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE created_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '7 days'

pairs.question: Revenue this year
pairs.expectedSql: SELECT SUM(total_amount) FROM orders WHERE strftime('%Y', created_at) = strftime('%Y', 'now')
pairs.postgresExpectedSql: SELECT SUM(total_amount) FROM orders WHERE date_trunc('year', created_at) = date_trunc('year', CURRENT_DATE)

pairs.question: Show all my products
pairs.expectedSql: SELECT * FROM products WHERE business_id = 1

pairs.question: Who are my users?
pairs.expectedSql: SELECT * FROM users WHERE business_id = 1

pairs.question: Total revenue for my business
pairs.expectedSql: SELECT SUM(total_amount) FROM orders WHERE business_id = 1 AND status = 'completed'

pairs.question: My pending orders
pairs.expectedSql: SELECT * FROM orders WHERE status = 'pending' AND business_id = 1
